framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis SUSTAINED 2+ waves, IDF 120+ munitions Tehran Sunday, 3-front war Day 37
history.note: Day 37. ★★★★★ MULTI-FRONT SUSTAINED: (1) IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over; (2) ISW Mar 28: Iran launched 6 small missile barrages at Israel — psychological cost strategy with limited capacity; (3) IDF dropped 120+ munitions on Tehran Sunday night targeting weapons R&D sites (IDF/AP); (4) Houthis SUSTAINED — 2+ waves at Israel, IDF intercepted 2 Yemen drones early Monday (IDF); (5) Hezbollah CONTINUING — Netanyahu ordered EXPANSION southern Lebanon invasion Sunday (AP); (6) 3,500 Marines+sailors arrived USS Tripoli (CENTCOM); (7) More than 3,000 killed in war total (AP Mar 30); (8) US KIA: 15 confirmed + 332 wounded; (9) Iran casualties: 2,076+ killed (Health Ministry), HRANA 3,461, Hengaw 6,900; (10) Trump FT interview: preferred option 'take the oil', likened to Venezuela; (11) Iran threatened strikes on US/Israeli commanders homes + universities in Gulf; (12) Qalibaf: 'waiting for US troops on ground to set them on fire'. PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed BUT 3 INDEPENDENT fronts active (IRGC residual small salvos + Houthis sustained + Hezbollah expanding). Trump 'take the oil' = new escalatory rhetoric. Source: AP/IDF/ISW/CENTCOM/FT/Reuters/CNBC

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis SUSTAINED 2+ waves, SOF deployed, Russia sat imagery to Iran

PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed BUT 3 INDEPENDENT fronts active + SOF buildup + Russia operational support = war WIDENING while ballistic missile production HALTED. Source: NYT/ISW/WashPost/AP/IDF/WSJ

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Kuwaiti VLCC Al-Salmi struck at Dubai port, Iran missiles at Israel (Jerusalem sirens)
history.note: Day 39. ★★★★★ MAJOR ESCALATION: (1) Iran drone struck Kuwaiti VLCC Al-Salmi at Dubai port — FULLY LADEN, fire onboard, hull damage, oil spill risk (Bloomberg/NYT/CBS/Guardian Mar 31); (2) Iran fired NEW missile salvo at Israel Tuesday — IDF intercepting, sirens in Jerusalem (CBS Mar 31); (3) Kuwait air defenses responding to hostile missile+drone attacks; (4) IDF 170 targets/24h including Tehran (IDF); (5) IDF new wave 'in heart of Tehran' Monday night; (6) Houthis SUSTAINED 2+ waves at Israel — INDEPENDENT; (7) Hezbollah CONTINUING — Netanyahu expanded Lebanon ops; (8) CENTCOM 10,000+ targets struck; (9) US KIA: 15 confirmed (Wikipedia) + 313 wounded (Spectrum); (10) Iran: 2,076+ killed (Health Ministry), HRANA 3,486+; (11) Russia providing satellite imagery to Iran (ISW/Zelensky); (12) SOF (Rangers/SEALs) deployed — not yet assigned missions but could safeguard Hormuz (NYT). PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed BUT ★★★ Kuwaiti tanker attack at DUBAI PORT = ECONOMIC WARFARE ON NEUTRAL SHIPPING — attacks moving from military to COMMERCIAL INFRASTRUCTURE at MAJOR ports. 3 INDEPENDENT fronts active (IRGC residual + Houthis sustained + Hezbollah). Source: Bloomberg/NYT/CBS/Guardian/Wikipedia/Spectrum/ISW/IDF

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC baseline) BUT 100+ missile joint salvo Apr 1 with Houthis+Hezbollah
history.note: Day 42. ★★★★★ PATTERN BREAK — JOINT SALVO: (1) IRGC launched NEW coordinated wave: 100+ heavy missiles + attack drones + 200+ rockets — JOINT with Houthis + Hezbollah (Moneycontrol/TheHindu Apr 1); (2) Houthis '3rd military operation targeting sensitive Israeli targets with ballistic missiles' — jointly with Iran + Hezbollah (Yahya Saree statement); (3) This is SIGNIFICANT REVERSAL from 1-2/day declining pattern — suggests coordinated multi-front salvo capability REMAINS; (4) Trump claims Pezeshkian asked for ceasefire (TruthSocial Apr 1) — Iran calls it 'false, baseless'; (5) IRGC 18-company deadline at 20:00 Tehran Apr 1 — UNTESTED at pipeline time; (6) A-10 Warthogs deploying to Hormuz as ground operation option emerges (ArmyRecognition Apr 1); (7) Argentina designated IRGC terrorist org (Mar 31); (8) US KIA: 15+ confirmed + 300+ wounded; (9) IDF continuing Tehran strikes; (10) Iran: HRANA 3,486+ killed. CRITICAL: Joint salvo BREAKS the 1-2/day pattern — must monitor if this is one-off coordinated show-of-force or return to mass salvos. 3 INDEPENDENT fronts CONFIRMED ACTIVE simultaneously. Source: Moneycontrol/TheHindu/ArmyRecognition/Reuters/CNBC/Axios

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, Trump: Iran agreed 20 ships starting Monday, USNI 142 transits = 94.6% decline)
history.note: Day 37. ★★★ TRANSIT: (1) USNI/Lloyd's: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline; (2) Trump aboard AF1: Iran agreed to allow 20 ships carrying oil through Hormuz starting Monday 'out of sign of respect' (AP Mar 29); (3) Pakistan FM: Iran allowing 20 Pakistan-flagged ships (2/day); (4) IRGC yuan-denominated toll via Larak (~USD2M/transit); (5) ~3,000 vessels waiting (NYT); (6) Oxford Economics: impassable until May; (7) CBS: unclear if military escorts materialize before conflict ends; (8) Brent soared 55%+ in March = record monthly surge (CNBC). If Trump's 20-ship claim materializes, marginal improvement but still 95% below pre-crisis (17-20 mbd). Source: AP/USNI/Lloyd's/CNBC/CBS/Oxford/NYT

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, Trump claims 20 ships Monday, SOF may safeguard Hormuz)

Trump's 20-ship claim = potentially significant IF materializes Monday, but no independent confirmation. SOF Hormuz safeguarding = potential game-changer for transit. Still 95% below pre-crisis. Source: NYT/USNI/IntelliNews/Guardian/Oxford

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, 2 COSCO state ships transited, Bessent: US will 'retake' Hormuz + escort plans)
history.note: Day 37 PM. ★★★★★ TRANSIT SIGNALS: (1) ★★★ Bloomberg Mar 30: TWO COSCO Shipping Corp container ships exited Hormuz — FIRST major Chinese state-backed company vessels since war began; (2) ★★★ Bessent (Treasury Sec): 'Over time, US is going to retake control of the straits, freedom of navigation through US escorts or multinational escort' (Bloomberg); (3) Rubio: Pentagon 'preparing optionality' for Hormuz (ABC); (4) USNI/Lloyd's: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline; (5) Iran blocked previous Chinese ships Mar 27 BUT now allowing COSCO = ESCALATION OF FRIENDLY ACCESS; (6) ~3,000 vessels waiting (NYT); (7) Oxford: impassable until May; (8) Brent USD115.35 (+2.47%). COSCO transit = significant — if state-backed Chinese majors flowing, trickle may accelerate. Bessent 'retake' = strongest US official statement on Hormuz control yet. Source: Bloomberg/ABC/Sky/USNI

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, 2 COSCO state ships transited Monday, Trump 20-ship claim UNVERIFIED)

COSCO transit = significant signal but macro picture unchanged: 95% below pre-crisis. Source: Reuters/NYT/NPR/CBS/Bloomberg

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, COSCO 2 ships confirmed Mon, Kuwaiti tanker STRUCK at Dubai — trickle recovery THREATENED, NO US escort)
history.note: Day 40. ★★★★★ TRANSIT + TANKER ATTACK: (1) Kuwaiti VLCC Al-Salmi STRUCK by Iran drone at Dubai port — fully laden, fire, hull damage (Bloomberg Mar 31) = most significant vessel attack to date; (2) COSCO 2 state-backed container ships transited Hormuz Monday (Reuters); (3) NO US Navy-escorted tanker transited under DFC program yet (InsuranceJournal Mar 31); (4) USNI/Lloyd's: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline; (5) Bessent: 'US will retake straits through escorts or multinational escort' (Bloomberg Mar 30); (6) Iran parliament pursuing formal Hormuz sovereignty codification + toll collection (NPR); (7) ~3,000 vessels waiting (NYT); (8) Dual chokepoint: Hormuz + Bab el-Mandeb (Houthis); (9) China-Pakistan 5-point plan calls for 'restoration of normal navigation in Hormuz' (Reuters Mar 31). Tanker attack DIRECTLY THREATENS trickle recovery. NO escort = blockade continues. Still 95% below pre-crisis. Source: Bloomberg/Reuters/InsuranceJournal/USNI/NPR/NYT

Tanker attack causing REVERSE flow — ships LEAVING ports, not entering strait. Source: Guardian/CNBC/USNI/Reuters

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.status: ACTIVE — China-Pakistan 5pt plan published, China RETREATING to supporter role, Iran REJECTED Chinese mediation, NO Chinese naval, COSCO transiting
fp1_china_action.findings: Day 43. ★★★★ CHINA ECONOMIC ENGAGEMENT BUT DIPLOMATIC RETREAT: (1) CNN Apr 1: China 'positioning as peace broker' BUT may STEP BACK — Pakistan already leading mediation; (2) China-Pakistan 5pt plan published Mar 31 (Reuters/Axios/Guardian): ceasefire + peace talks + civilian protection + Hormuz reopening + regional stability; (3) Wang Yi + Pakistan FM Dar joint statement Beijing Mar 31; (4) Zhai Jun tour of Gulf states — 'one who tied the bell must untie it' re US/Israel; (5) Iran REJECTED Chinese mediation offer (VOR Mar 31); (6) BUT COSCO 2 ULCVs transited Hormuz (Safety4Sea Apr 1) = economic engagement continues; (7) 5 friendly nations including China allowed transit — China has ECONOMIC stakes in Hormuz reopening; (8) Breitbart Apr 2: China 'debuts peace plan' — ceasefire + UN respect + begin talks; (9) NO Chinese naval deployment. fp1 PARTIALLY ACTIVE — most concrete diplomatic framework yet BUT China pulling back to SUPPORTER of Pakistan-led process while maintaining economic access. Source: CNN/Reuters/Axios/Safety4Sea/VOR/Breitbart

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.status: PEAK PARADOX + REVERSAL — Trump 'extremely hard 2-3 weeks' speech Apr 1 TRIGGERED oil spike + stock dump Apr 2, Iran denies ALL talks, JD Vance via Pakistan intermediaries
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: Day 43. ★★★★★ MAXIMUM INCOHERENCE → MARKET REVERSAL: (1) NYT Apr 2: oil prices JUMP + stocks TUMBLE after Trump vows to hit Iran 'extremely hard over next 2-3 weeks' — markets now pricing ESCALATION not wind-down; (2) Brent surged to ~USD107 (+6%) after falling to USD101 on initial 'wind-down' rhetoric (NYT); (3) Trump Apr 1 primetime: 'core strategic objectives nearing completion' + 'leaving very soon' — 19min address (CNBC/NYT/AP/Politico); (4) BUT Iran FM Araghchi: 'no negotiations with Washington' only 'exchanges of messages through intermediaries' (AJE Apr 1); (5) Reuters Apr 2: JD Vance communicated with Pakistan intermediaries as recently as Tuesday, making clear Trump open to ceasefire IF Hormuz reopened; (6) Arms Control Association Apr 2: 'unclear if Tehran willing to negotiate or if Israel would agree'; (7) WashTimes Apr 1: 'Who is Trump negotiating with?' — IRGC/Pezeshkian/Qalibaf power struggle unresolved; (8) IRGC 100+ joint salvo Apr 1 DURING 'wind-down' speech = maximum action-rhetoric gap; (9) Apr 6 energy destruction deadline = 4 DAYS. fp2 PEAK — market now REVERSING from hope to fear as speech contradictions crystallize. Source: NYT/Reuters/AJE/ArmsControl/WashTimes/CNBC/Politico

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.status: DEADLOCKED + 4 COMPETING FRAMEWORKS — Trump Hormuz-first, Iran war-end-first, China-Pakistan 5pt, UNSC divided, Lebanon linkage demand NEW
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: Day 43. ★★★★★ DEADLOCK + NEW COMPLICATION: (1) Iran NOW DEMANDS Lebanon included in ceasefire — makes deal conditional on ending 2026 Lebanon war (Wikipedia/NYT); (2) China-Pakistan 5pt plan published (Reuters/Axios Mar 31); (3) Iran 5pt counter: war end + reparations + sovereignty + guarantees; (4) US 15pt plan — Iran says received via intermediaries only, 'not negotiations'; (5) UNSC: Western draft passed under Chapter 7 BUT China/Russia opposed — 'unbalanced' (KSAT Apr 1); (6) Iran FM: 'no ceasefire but complete end to war' (AJE Apr 1); (7) Trump precondition: Hormuz open BEFORE ceasefire; (8) Iran precondition: US stops ALL attacks before any talks; (9) Senate War Powers blocked 53-47; House mid-April; (10) JD Vance via Pakistan intermediaries (Reuters Apr 2). fp3 STALLED — who stops first? Lebanon linkage = NEW complication making deal even harder. Apr 6 energy deadline + mid-April War Powers vote = two approaching forcing functions. Source: Wikipedia/NYT/Reuters/KSAT/AJE/Axios

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.status: ALL BARRIERS BREACHED + REVERSAL — gas USD4.064, Brent USD107 SPIKING (not falling), 13-15 KIA + casualty cover-up, Pentagon credibility crisis
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: Day 43. ★★★★★ COST ACCELERATION + CREDIBILITY CRISIS: (1) NYT Apr 2: oil JUMPS + stocks TUMBLE on Trump '2-3 weeks extremely hard' vow — market REVERSING wind-down bet; (2) Brent ~USD107 (+6%), WTI ~USD103; (3) Gas USD4.064/gal national (Apr 2), CA USD5.87+, up 30%+ since war began (CNBC/BBC); (4) Intercept Apr 1: Pentagon COVERING UP casualty figures — 15 US troops wounded in single Friday Saudi base attack (Intercept); (5) US KIA: 13 confirmed (NYT/Pentagon) to 15 (Wikipedia), 300+ wounded officially BUT likely higher; (6) HRANA: 3,486+ Iranian deaths; (7) 1,260+ Lebanese killed; (8) Gold USD4,758 — safe-haven ELEVATED (LiteFinance Apr 2); (9) S&P 500 fell after Apr 1 rally — whipsaw; (10) JetBlue/airlines raising fees — downstream cascading; (11) Center for American Progress: war 'will raise fuel prices and costs throughout economy' (Mar 27). fp4 APPROACHING TIPPING POINT — gas barrier BREACHED, casualties mounting with cover-up allegations, but Congressional action stalled until mid-April. Apr 6 energy deadline = 4 days. Source: NYT/CNBC/BBC/Intercept/LiteFinance/CAP

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
